implementedBehavior: runCodexCliExecPlan now supports modelProbe reuse, requireModelProbe gating, and autoProbeModelWithCli preflight before the main spawn.
Automatic CLI model probe reuses the selected plan.model and runs as a read-only codex exec probe with approvalPolicy never.
Cached probe evidence can be supplied through modelProbe to avoid rerunning the probe.
Strict execution blocks when required model probe evidence is missing or when the auto-probe fails.
The internal CLI probe path sets skipExecutionModelProbe to avoid recursive self-probing.

coveredScenarios.name: require_cached_probe
coveredScenarios.result: validateCodexCliExecPlanForRun blocks with codex_cli_model_probe_required when a probe is required but not supplied and auto-probe is disabled

coveredScenarios.name: auto_probe_before_main_spawn
coveredScenarios.result: runCodexCliExecPlan runs a CLI model probe first and only then executes the main task when the probe passes

coveredScenarios.name: strict_probe_failure_blocks_main_run
coveredScenarios.result: main execution is blocked when the automatic CLI model probe fails in strict mode

limitations: This evidence validates the automatic preflight through injected spawners rather than a new live Codex CLI execution.
Host/startup integration still needs to choose whether to cache probe evidence or auto-probe on every execution boundary.
